detail.runAndDirDesc: Display hidden info, directory paths, and current runtime parameters.
detail.notRunningHint: Not running. Launch parameters will display after environment starts.
detail.confirmCleanCacheDesc: Will clean current environment's cache-data directory. Only cache files will be deleted. Account data and user-data will not be affected. This operation can only be performed when the environment is closed.
detail.fingerprintSummaryDesc: Right side displays key parameters that will be injected to Chromium

basic.title: Basic Settings
basic.desc: Profile name, browser version, simulated platform, device preset and group
basic.name: Profile Name
basic.onlyHostVersions: Only showing Chromium versions available for current host system.
basic.devicePresetHelp: Preset determines UA, UA metadata, default resolution, DPR, GL, fonts, CPU, RAM and other fingerprint parameters.
basic.startupUrlsHelp: One URL per line. Only http and https supported.
basic.versionAutoResolve: Resolve to latest host version on startup
basic.versionNotAvailable: No resources for this version on current system

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.desc: Headless mode, launch args and geolocation
advanced.geoFollowIpHint: On startup, prefer using proxy's latest GEO result. Fall back to local public IP if proxy has no GEO.
advanced.geoCustomHint: On startup, query local public IP and resolve with local GEO database.
advanced.cookieHelp: Only supports Chromium `cookie-state-file` compatible JSON. After saving, will write to environment local cookie file and inject on startup.
advanced.cookieLoaded: Environment local cookie file content currently filled.
advanced.mergeCookieDesc: Input another Cookie JSON. After confirmation, will merge by name + domain + path. Later input overwrites earlier.

fingerprint.title: Fingerprint Policy
fingerprint.desc: Configure high-level intent; system automatically resolves full fingerprint by platform/device/version
fingerprint.proxyDefaultHint: Proxy defaults connected, language/timezone can auto-fill or be manually overridden.
fingerprint.fontPoolHelp: Current platform font pool: {{count}} items. Random set generated on page load. Can manually modify.
fingerprint.deviceNameOverrideHelp: Overrides hostname visible in Chromium process. Does not affect real system device name.
fingerprint.macOverrideHelp: Overrides network interface MAC exported by Chromium. Does not modify real system network card.
fingerprint.doNotTrackDesc: Send "Do Not Track" request to websites, asking not to collect or track your browsing data.
fingerprint.resolutionHelp: Initial value from current device preset. If preset changes, resolution resets to new preset default.
fingerprint.randomSeedOnStart: Random fingerprint-seed on startup (not full fingerprint randomization)

list.title: Profile List
list.emptyNoProfiles: No profiles yet, create one first.
list.stopAllConfirmDesc: Stop {{count}} running profiles from current filter results?

cookies.noSitesToExport: No site cookies available to export.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.desc: Select plugins from the downloaded library to launch with current environment. Changes require restart for running profiles.
plugins.noPlugins: No downloaded plugins yet. Go to the plugin page to download by extension ID, then return here to select plugins to install.
plugins.needsRestart: Profile is running. Plugin changes will take effect after restart.
plugins.version: New version {{version}} detected. If you want the environment to use the new version, please go to the plugin page to update the package first.

proxySettings.title: Proxy Settings
proxySettings.desc: Bind a proxy when creating the profile
proxySettings.proxyHint: After selecting a proxy, suggested language, timezone and geolocation will be auto-filled; manual edits won't be overwritten.

backgroundColor.title: Modify Browser Background Color
backgroundColor.desc: Settings will sync to the profile background color. Click "Reset Background Color" to remove the parameter and restore default behavior.
backgroundColor.invalidFormat: Background color must be in #RRGGBB format

toolbarText.title: Modify Toolbar Text (empty will fall back to profile name)
toolbarText.label: Toolbar Text
